title: StockReserved
description: Published by the Inventory service when stock has been successfully reserved for an order. Consumed by the Orders service to advance the place-order saga.

reservationId.description: Unique identifier for this reservation. Used in ReleaseStockReservation commands.

orderId.description: The Order that triggered this reservation.

sku.description: The SKU for which stock was reserved.

quantityReserved.description: Quantity successfully reserved. Equal to the requested quantity (partial reservations are not supported).

availableAfterReservation.description: Stock level available for new reservations immediately after this reservation was applied.

expiresAt.description: UTC timestamp when this reservation expires if the order is not confirmed. Reservation TTL is defined in Inventory service config (default: 15 minutes).
